sys_script.name: Query_incident

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_51efd17047036910eea9ba48436d43ac
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>false</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>false</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>incident</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Query_incident</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {

	var myObj = new GlideRecord('incident');
    myObj.addQuery('priority','=','2');
    myObj.addQuery('Active','=','true');
    gs.info("Returned record count = " + myObj.getRowCount());

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2023-05-24 06:27:16</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>51efd17047036910eea9ba48436d43ac</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Query_incident</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Module3" source="x_1052881_module3">c9619ea047b2a510eea9ba48436d4318</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Module3">c9619ea047b2a510eea9ba48436d4318</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_51efd17047036910eea9ba48436d43ac</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2023-05-25 10:27:58</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=51efd17047036910eea9ba48436d43ac"/></record_update>
